assertions.assertion: Code contains AddFrontend for 'admin' with MatchingPath '/admin' and CdnIndexHtmlUrl pointing to the CDN URL
assertions.rationale: Code shows `AddFrontend("admin", frontend => { frontend.MatchingPath = "/admin"; frontend.CdnIndexHtmlUrl = new Uri("https://cdn.example.com/admin/index.html"); ... })`.

assertions.assertion: Code contains AddFrontend for 'portal' with MatchingPath '/portal' and CdnIndexHtmlUrl pointing to the portal CDN URL
assertions.rationale: Code shows `AddFrontend("portal", frontend => { frontend.MatchingPath = "/portal"; frontend.CdnIndexHtmlUrl = new Uri("https://cdn.example.com/portal/index.html"); ... })`.

assertions.assertion: Each frontend has its own ConfigureOpenIdConnect with distinct client configuration
assertions.rationale: Admin has ClientId 'admin-client' and portal has ClientId 'portal-client', each with their own ConfigureOpenIdConnect.

assertions.assertion: Each frontend has AddRemoteApi or equivalent remote API proxying configuration
assertions.rationale: Each frontend calls `frontend.AddRemoteApi(...)` with distinct API targets.

assertions.assertion: Uses AddBff() as the base builder
assertions.rationale: Code starts with `builder.Services.AddBff()` and chains AddFrontend calls from it.
